title: CS Jobs 2026 – Programme Expert, SPMU Skill Operation and More
shortInfo: NABARD Consultancy Services (NABCONS) Recruitment 2026 for 5 posts of Project Based Contract Staff. Candidates with MBA/PGDM/PGDRDM, MSW / Post graduate, Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 28-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NABCONS official website nabcons.com.

basic_details.job_title: NABCONS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Programme Expert, SPMU Skill Operation and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: NABARD Consultancy Services (NABCONS) Recruitment 2026 for 5 posts of Project Based Contract Staff. Candidates with MBA/PGDM/PGDRDM, MSW / Post graduate, Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 28-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NABCONS official website nabcons.com.

application_fee.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts.

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the NABCONS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: MBA/PGDM/PGDRDM/ PG in any discipline, MBA/ PGDM/ MSW / Post graduate in Rural Development/ Management or equivalent qualification (2 years full time) from reputed institute or university, MBA Finance/CA/ICWA/CS Inter
qualification.details: SPMU Skill Operation: MBA/PGDM/PGDRDM/ PG in any discipline. Programme expert (placement and post placement Tracking): MBA/ PGDM/ MSW / Post graduate in Rural Development/ Management or equivalent qualification (2 years full time) from reputed institute or university. Programme Expert – (Training Centre Monitoring and Quality Assurance): MBA/ PGDM/ MSW / Post graduate in Rural Development/ Management or equivalent qualification (2 years full time) from reputed institute or university. Associate Project Consultant Finance: MBA Finance/CA/ICWA/CS Inter.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Programme Expert, SPMU Skill Operation and More

salary_details.pay_scale: INR 1.40 Lakhs, INR 96,000/- pm, INR 79,000/- pm
salary_details.salary: INR 1.40 Lakhs, INR 96,000/- pm, INR 79,000/- pm

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NABCONS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for NABCONS Project Based Contract Staff posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications for the NABCONS Project Based Contract Staff positions is 28th May 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for Project Based Contract Staff?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for Project Based Contract Staff positions announced by NABCONS. These vacancies are distributed across various specialized roles within the organization.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Associate Project Consultant Finance post?
faq.answer: For the Associate Project Consultant Finance post, candidates must possess an MBA in Finance, CA, ICWA, or CS Inter qualification. This ensures candidates have the necessary financial expertise.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for NABCONS recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for the NABCONS Project Based Contract Staff recruitment. This makes the application process more accessible.

faq.question: What is the maximum age limit for the Project Based Contract Staff positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Project Based Contract Staff positions is 45 years. Candidates should ensure they meet this age criterion at the time of application.

faq.question: What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Based Contract Staff positions at NABCONS will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience for the interview stage.

faq.question: What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are on a contract basis. This means that the employment is for a fixed tenure as specified by NABCONS, offering project-specific opportunities.

faq.question: Which city are these jobs located in?
faq.answer: The NABCONS Project Based Contract Staff positions are located in Chandigarh, Punjab. Candidates applying should be willing to work in this location.

faq.question: What is the salary for the SPMU Skill Operation post?
faq.answer: The salary for the SPMU Skill Operation post is INR 1.40 Lakhs. This is a consolidated monthly remuneration for the selected candidate for this role.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification for NABCONS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for NABCONS Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the Important Links section provided in this article. It contains all detailed information regarding the recruitment process.
